text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Special Week, I walk her
back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, today was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It feels different when I hang out with you,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's not like when I go out with my mom or with my
friends. I actually feel a little nervous...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh! But I don't mean that in a bad way!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think my excitement is turning into
nervousness... It's hard to explain....
choice_data_list: Where do you usually go with your mom?
Where do you usually go with your mom?
Where do you usually go with your friends?
Where do you usually go with your friends?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I think my excitement is turning into
nervousness... It's hard to explain....
choice_data_list: Where do you usually go with your mom?
Where do you usually go with your mom?

Where do you usually go with your friends?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
With my mom, we go to the farm across the road
and help out...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And we hand out community notices to the old
folks around the neighborhood.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hang on a second... Does that even count as
going out?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Actually, yeah it does! Going out doesn't always
have to be to some special place. It's just gotta
be fun, hehe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, El takes me to restaurants with super spicy
food sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And with King, I take on giant ramen bowl
challenges...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hold up. Is eating all I do? Aww, that's kinda
embarrassing...
